## Change type

- [ ] Skill behavior
- [ ] Router behavior
- [ ] Documentation or collaboration workflow

## Scope

Skill/tool:

Problem being solved:

## Behavior evidence

Baseline:

Candidate:

Cases tested, including at least one holdout for promoted behavior:

## Ecommerce image evidence

Complete when the pull request changes image behavior; otherwise write `N/A`.

- Task type:
- SKU reference supplied: yes/no
- Platform / market / slot / audience:
- Identity result:
- Claims result:
- Composition/readability/platform-fit result:
- Provider/model and cost impact:
- Intended Feishu/delivery writeback:

## Safety

- [ ] No provider key, App Secret, access token, bearer token, `.env`, customer data, or generated media is committed.
- [ ] Generated output is not described as approved or published without human confirmation.
- [ ] Product facts come from the shared Feishu source, not duplicated local truth.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Relevant dry-run or live smoke test completed
- [ ] Documentation updated when the contract changed
